checklist.entry: Incoming HTTP requests are passed to a Worker fetch handler as a Request object.
A Worker must return a Response object to respond to the request.
The env parameter contains bindings available to the Worker.
The ctx parameter exposes execution context functions such as waitUntil and passThroughOnException.
The Workers runtime does not support XMLHttpRequest; use fetch-compatible APIs.
Workers can receive requests through custom domains, routes or workers.dev subdomains.
Use Workers routes when an origin server exists external to Cloudflare.
Use Custom Domains when the Worker is the application origin server.
